description: Create a corporate letterhead template for 'Apex Innovations' and save it as a LibreOffice Writer Template (.ott) to /home/ga/Documents/apex_letterhead.ott. The template must have a 2.00" top margin and 1.00" margins for the left, right, and bottom. Include the company logo from /home/ga/Documents/apex_logo.png in the header and the center-aligned grey text 'Apex Innovations | 123 Tech Blvd, Silicon Valley, CA' in the footer. Define two custom paragraph styles: 'Apex Title' (Liberation Sans or Arial, 18pt, Bold, Dark Blue #00008B) and 'Apex Body' (Liberation Serif or Times New Roman, 11pt, Black).

metadata.footer_text: Apex Innovations | 123 Tech Blvd, Silicon Valley, CA
